---
title: "zealhmm"
subtitle: "Teosinte-introgression QTL recovery under low-coverage genotyping"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: foundations-calling
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Genotype likelihoods"
        path: analysis/genotype_likelihoods_and_hmm.qmd
        description: "GL → posterior → call; where the prior lives; what accumulation can and cannot do"
      - title: "Zygosity identifiability"
        path: analysis/snp50k_genotype_identifiability.qmd
        description: "Why SNP50K skim can't resolve het/hom — rare-allele prior + outbred-donor dilution"
      - title: "Emission by depth"
        path: analysis/emission_by_depth_regime.qmd
        description: "When read counts earn their keep vs a hard genotype"
  - id: foundations
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Coverage theory"
        path: analysis/missing-data-coverage-theory.qmd
        description: "Poisson coverage model — the missing-data baseline"
      - title: "Floor model"
        path: analysis/missing-data-floor-model.qmd
        description: "Exponential-with-floor missingness, fit to BZea BAM alignments"
      - title: "Model comparison"
        path: analysis/missing-data-model-comparison.qmd
        description: "Floor model across WGS, Wideseq, and SNP50K datasets"
      - title: "Ergodicity assumption"
        path: analysis/wideseq-coverage-ergodicity.qmd
        description: "Scale-invariance of missing(λ) — the per-sample coverage model transfers to the per-bin scale"
  - id: methods
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Ancestry callers"
        path: analysis/callers-and-methods.qmd
        description: "nNIL, RTIGER, LB-Impute, binhmm, control"
      - title: "Simulation calibration"
        path: analysis/simulation-calibration.qmd
        description: "Per-coverage caller calibration on simulated truth"
  - id: teonam
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "QTL recovery"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery.qmd
        description: "Core QTL-recovery reproduction"
      - title: "QTL recovery · 118K OLS"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-118k.qmd
        description: "118K OLS GWAS + JLM + coverage sweep"
      - title: "QTL recovery · 118K MLM"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "118K MLM (Family + K), STAM"
      - title: "DTA · 118K MLM"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "DTA MLM composite + five-caller sweep + noisiness"
      - title: "Caller calibration"
        path: analysis/teonam-caller-calibration.qmd
        description: "Per-coverage caller parameters (rigidity/rrate/recombdist) by min-FDR on simulated truth"
      - title: "STAM · MLM (Q + K, Fig 4C)"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "TASSEL 5-PC + Centered-IBS K, exact Fig-4C model + QQ/λ"
      - title: "STAM · OLS 118K"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "OLS (Family + marker), 118K panel"
      - title: "STAM · MLM interpolated"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated.qmd
        description: "MLM on the interpolated 51K map panel"
      - title: "STAM · OLS family-imputed"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed.qmd
        description: "OLS on the family-imputed panel"
      - title: "Genetic map"
        path: analysis/teonam-genetic-map.qmd
        description: "Native v5 R/qtl composite genetic map"
      - title: "Marker thinning"
        path: analysis/marker-thinning.qmd
        description: "cM thinning as a Max Distance-d Independent Set"
  - id: zeal-methods
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "RTIGER vs nilHMM"
        path: analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.qmd
        description: "Ancestry-call agreement between callers"
      - title: "nilHMM painting"
        path: analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.qmd
        description: "Ancestry-painting sanity check"
      - title: "Source/method comparison"
        path: analysis/source-method-comparison.qmd
        description: "Genotype-source and method comparisons"
  - id: zeal-pop
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "DTA · MLM + JLM"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "DTA: JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison"
      - title: "DTA · FDR ≤ 0.05"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k-fdr.qmd
        description: "DTA: same, FDR ≤ 0.05"
      - title: "PH · FDR ≤ 0.05"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-ph-mlm-snp50k-fdr.qmd
        description: "Plant height: JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, dwarf/GA candidates, FDR ≤ 0.05"
      - title: "DTS · FDR ≤ 0.05"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dts-mlm-snp50k-fdr.qmd
        description: "Days to silk (flowering): JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, flowering candidates, FDR ≤ 0.05"
      - title: "StPi · FDR ≤ 0.05"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-stpi-mlm-snp50k-fdr.qmd
        description: "Stem pigment (anthocyanin): phenotype used directly (no spatial correction, 0–1 score); JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, anthocyanin-pathway candidates, FDR ≤ 0.05"
  - id: zeal-inv4m
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Inv4m genotype · 50K vs 250K"
        path: analysis/zeal-inv4m-rtiger-genotype.qmd
        description: "Genotype at the Inv4m tagging SNP (PZE04175660223) from the 250K (previous, Nirwan) and 50K (current, Fausto) RTIGER call sets: confusion matrix, BC2S3 goodness-of-fit, and the flowering-time LMM on each"
---

Analysis notebooks grouped by **dataset**, and within each dataset by the **paper**
the work supports. Two papers are being written here — the **nilHMM R package paper**
(priority) and the **ZEAL population paper** — plus the **Inv4m paper** (already
written, in review), which this repo supplies updated genotypes to.

## nilHMM methods

### §1 Foundations — missing data

The Poisson and exponential-with-floor model of missing data, fit to the BZea
population.

::: {#foundations}
:::

### §1 Foundations — genotype calling

Single-read genotype likelihoods and the prior's role in low-coverage calling, the
depth-driven emission choice, and why the SNP50K skim cannot resolve zygosity.

::: {#foundations-calling}
:::

### Engine & calibration

The shared HMM engine and its `simcross` calibration — common to every dataset below.

::: {#methods}
:::

## TeoNAM

W22 × 5 teosinte inbreds; 1,257 BC1S4 RILs (Chen 2019).

### nilHMM R package paper

Empirical-truth reproduction and the coverage-degradation QTL-recovery sweeps — the
results core of the methods paper.

::: {#teonam}
:::

## ZEAL / BZea

::: {style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1.5rem;"}
![](zeal.png){fig-alt="ZEAL — Zea Exotic Allele Library" width="200"}

*Zea Exotic Allele Library*
:::

B73 × teosinte BC2S3 near-isogenic lines; SNP50K panel at ~0.4× skim.

### nilHMM R package paper

The ZEAL data used as method demonstration — caller agreement, ancestry painting
across sources, and the paired skim + BRB-seq cross-modality comparison.

::: {#zeal-methods}
:::

### ZEAL population paper

Trait QTL recovery on the ZEAL/BZea population (a reflection of the TeoNAM analysis):
JLM + MLM composites with five-caller comparison, at FDR ≤ 0.05.

::: {#zeal-pop}
:::

### Inv4m paper (in review)

Updated-genotype support for the *Inv4m* inversion–flowering paper.

::: {#zeal-inv4m}
:::
